title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
